== Notes for [[Item:Q57907|Q57907]] ==

"'''México, Distrito Federal, registros parroquiales y diocesanos, 1514-1970'''", database with images, FamilySearch (https://familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:JMBQ-HHH : 28 July 2015), Francisco Alfonso de Sosa in entry for Fernando de Sosa, 1618. ... Name: '''Fernando de Sosa'''; Event Type: '''Baptism'''; Event Date: '''31 Oct 1618'''; Event Place: '''Asunción Sagrario Metropolitano (Centro), , Distrito Federal, Mexico'''; Gender: Male; Father's Name: Francisco Alfonso de Sosa; Mother's Name: Luysa de Avendano

See a '''photograph of Fernando's original Baptism Record''' in his profile's "Media/Documents" section.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADCDEF5A1EFBBFA9822EF79916C9990
geni:6000000068151961070

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
